name: init-components-helper
description: CLI _init_components helper wires together Store, TmuxManager, WorktreeManager, AgentPool, Planner, ValidationGates, Orchestrator in one call

name: cli-testing-clirunner
description: CLI commands use Click CliRunner for testing, mock _init_components or underlying classes

name: non-blocking-run-pattern
description: CLI non-blocking run pattern: hf run defaults to non-blocking (queues run via RunManager.submit), use --foreground flag for blocking orchestrator.run() behavior. RunManager handles submit (creates queued run) and cancel (updates state to cancelled) operations.

name: queue-command-pattern
description: CLI queue command aggregates runs from three sources: fetch_queued_runs() for pending, fetch_active_runs() for in-progress, and fetchall() for recent terminal states. Output shows ID, state, task, and duration with summary counts.
